nodes.name: Every Day at 6 AM
nodes.notes: Triggers every day at 6:00 AM local time. Generates your morning briefing before you start the day. Adjust the cron expression for your timezone if n8n runs in UTC.

nodes.name: Get Today Tasks
nodes.notes: Fetches all tasks from Notion with Status = 'Today'. These are tasks you've already committed to for today.

nodes.name: Get High-Priority Backlog
nodes.notes: Fetches high-priority backlog items that could be pulled into today's work. Limited to top 10 to keep the briefing focused.

nodes.name: Get Tasks Due Today
nodes.notes: Fetches any tasks with a due date of today or earlier that are NOT done. These are urgent items that need attention — overdue items will also show up here.

nodes.name: Get Google Calendar Events
nodes.notes: Fetches today's Google Calendar events via the Calendar API. In production, use the Google Calendar n8n node with OAuth2 credentials instead of raw HTTP. This shows the API structure for reference. Replace with proper Google Calendar node and credentials.

nodes.name: Aggregate Morning Data
nodes.notes: Combines all data sources — today's tasks, high-priority backlog, due/overdue items, and calendar events — into a single structured object for Claude to analyze and prioritize.

nodes.name: Claude - Prioritize & Brief
nodes.notes: Sends all morning data to Claude for intelligent prioritization. Claude considers calendar blocks, energy patterns, task dependencies, and time estimates. Returns both a human-readable briefing and a JSON block with priority rankings. Replace API key.

nodes.name: Parse Briefing & Priorities
nodes.notes: Separates Claude's response into the human-readable briefing text and the machine-readable priority ranking JSON. The briefing goes to Notion; the rankings are used to update task priorities.

nodes.name: Split Priority Updates
nodes.notes: Splits the priority ranking array into individual items so each task can be updated in Notion separately.

nodes.name: Has Priority Updates?
nodes.notes: Checks if there are priority updates to apply. Skips Notion updates if Claude didn't return any rankings.

nodes.name: Update Task Priority in Notion
nodes.notes: Updates each task's priority and daily rank in Notion based on Claude's recommendations. The 'Day Rank' field gives you a suggested execution order.

nodes.name: Send Briefing Notification
nodes.notes: Sends the morning briefing as a push notification via ntfy.sh. Truncated to 500 chars for the notification — full briefing is in Notion. Replace the ntfy topic with yours. Can also use Slack, Discord, email, etc.

nodes.name: Save Briefing to Notion
nodes.notes: Saves the full morning briefing as a page in the Daily Reviews database (typed as 'Morning Briefing' to distinguish from evening reviews). Replace database ID.
